summary: Added a deterministic SpecBridge runtime launch planning command. The CLI now converts one ready executor packet into a bounded .specbridge/runtime-launches/*.runtime-launch.json artifact without launching Claude Code, Antigravity, shell commands, network calls, dependency installation, GitHub operations, or deployment.
policy_result: Passed. The task stayed inside the issue 063 contract and scope manifest. The new command writes only declared runtime launch plan paths, uses repository-relative source files, rejects unapproved tools, requires Read and Write for launch planning, enforces the configured budget ceiling, and records planning-only execution policy booleans.
risk_result: Medium risk because the task adds a runtime preparation surface for Claude Code launches. Risk is controlled by file-only planning, no live executor launch, no shell execution by the command, no dependency installation, no secrets, no production configuration, no authentication or authorization changes, no billing changes, no CI/CD weakening, and no deployment.
unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and checks run.
Runtime launch plans do not prove execution. A future contract must add controlled runtime result recording before SpecBridge can audit actual executor output from a prepared plan.
merge_status: Pending pull request, GitHub CI, and required merge gates.
